hermetic-tradition.description: Element-to-spell-category mappings and Drain attributes for the Hermetic Mage tradition

shamanic-tradition.description: Element-to-spell-category mappings and Drain attributes for the Shaman tradition

detection-spell-results.description: Net hits on a Detection spell Spellcasting Test mapped to the quality of information received

rows.result: Major details only, no minor details
Major and minor details, with some minor details obscured or missing

mind-probe.description: Net hits on a Mind Probe Spellcasting Test mapped to depth of information accessible

rows.result: Subject can read target's surface thoughts only
Subject can find out anything target consciously knows and view recent memories (up to 72 hours)
Subject can probe target's subconscious, gaining information the target may not even be consciously aware of (psychological quirks, deep fears, hidden memories)

object-resistance.description: Resistance dice pool for inanimate objects in Detection spells, Physical Barrier penetration, and other tests against non-living objects

rows.examples: Trees, soil, unprocessed water, hand-carved wood, metal cold-worked by hand
Advanced plastics, alloys, electronic equipment, sensors
Computers, complex toxic wastes, drones, vehicles

improved-reflexes.description: Power Point cost per level of the Improved Reflexes adept power

astral-attributes.description: Mapping of physical attributes to their astral equivalents for astrally projecting characters

assensing.description: Hits on an Assensing + Intuition [Astral] Test mapped to information revealed about the subject's aura

information_gained: The general state of the subject's health (healthy, injured, ill, etc.)
The subject's general emotional state or impression (happy, sad, angry, etc.)
Whether the subject is mundane or Awakened
The presence and location of cyberware implants
The class of a magical subject (fire elemental, manipulation spell, power focus, curse ritual, and so on)
If you have seen the subject's aura before, you may recognize it, regardless of physical disguises or alterations
The presence and location of alphaware cyber implants
Whether the subject's Essence and Magic are higher, lower, or equal to your own
Whether the subject's Force is higher, lower, or equal to your Magic
A general diagnosis for any maladies (diseases or toxins) the subject suffers
Any astral signatures present on the subject
The presence and location of betaware and bioware cyber implants
The exact Essence, Magic, and Force of the subject
The general cause of any astral signature (combat spell, alchemical combat spell, air spirit, and so on)
The presence and location of deltaware implants, gene treatments, and nanotech
An accurate diagnosis of any disease or toxins which afflict the subject
The fact that a subject is a technomancer

astral-damage.description: Attack tests and damage values for astral combat

rows.test: Astral Combat + Willpower [Astral] v. Intuition + Logic
Astral Combat + Willpower [Accuracy] v. Intuition + Logic
rows.damage_value: By weapon (using Charisma instead of Strength)

rows.test: Astral Combat + Willpower [Astral] v. Intuition + Logic
Astral Combat + Willpower [Astral] v. Intuition + Logic

astral-damage.notes: Add 1 to DV per net hit on attack. Damage type (Stun or Physical) is attacker's choice. Astral barriers can only be affected by Physical damage.

astral-tracking-modifiers.description: Modifiers to the threshold of the Assensing + Intuition (5, 1 hour) [Astral] Extended Test required to track an astral link

rows.condition: Each hour passed since astral link was active

mana-barriers.description: Sources of mana barriers and whether they exist on the astral plane, physical plane, or both

spirit-services.description: Services available from unbound and bound spirits

rows.description: Spirit fights on summoner's side; entire fight = 1 service
Spirit uses one of its powers on target(s); sustained power = 1 service regardless of duration
Spirit materializes to perform physical actions on the physical plane
Task beyond Magic × 100 meters; spirit is released after completing regardless of remaining services
Bound spirit can do everything an unbound spirit can; remote service does not consume extra services
Spirit adds Force dice to Alchemy tests if spirit type matches spell's tradition element
Spirit adds Force dice to Spellcasting and Ritual Spellcasting tests if type matches spell's element
Spirit adds Force dice to Learning Tests for appropriate spells
Spirit sustains a spell for the summoner (takes −2 penalty); lasts Force Combat Turns per service spent
Spirit sustains spell indefinitely; spirit's Force reduced irrevocably by 1 per day (or part); Force 0 = permanent dissipation

spirits.description: Physical attributes, initiative, astral initiative, skills, powers, optional powers, weaknesses, and special traits for the six base spirit types when materialized
spirits.notes: F = Force. All minimums are 1. Walking = Agility × 2; Running = Agility × 4. Optional powers: 1 per full 3 Force points.

air.special: Spirits of Air get +10 meters per hit when Sprinting

fire.special: Spirits of Fire get +5 meters per hit when Sprinting

optional_powers: Innate Spell (any one spell known by summoner; Force limited to spirit's Magic)

water.special: Spirits of Water move twice as fast when in water

watchers-and-homunculi.description: Stats for ritual-created minions: Watcher (astral) and Homunculus (physical)

watcher.notes: No corporeal body. Attributes marked * have no value.
watcher.duration: Force × net hits on sealing test (hours)

homunculus.notes: Body = Structure rating of material used. Minimum attribute value is 1.
homunculus.duration: Force × net hits on sealing test (days)

foci-bonding.description: Karma cost to bond each type of focus
foci-bonding.notes: Max bonded foci = Magic attribute. Max total Force of bonded foci = Magic × 5. Only one focus adds Force to a dice pool per test. Bonding takes 1 hour per Force.

magical-goods.description: Availability and nuyen cost for foci, formulae, and magical supplies

mentor-spirits.description: Full listing of mentor spirits with advantages (All, Magician, Adept) and disadvantages

rows.name: Bear
rows.magician_advantage: +2 dice for health spells, preparations, and health spell rituals
rows.disadvantage: May go berserk when taking Physical damage in combat or when someone under care is badly injured. Make Charisma + Willpower Test (wound modifiers apply); go berserk for 3 turns minus 1 turn per hit (3+ hits averts entirely). While berserk, attack attacker(s) regardless of own safety.

rows.name: Cat
rows.all_advantage: +2 dice to either Gymnastics or Infiltration Tests (choose one)
rows.magician_advantage: +2 dice for illusion spells, preparations, and illusion spell rituals
rows.disadvantage: Cannot make incapacitating attack unless Charisma + Willpower (3) Test succeeds at start of combat. This stops if Cat takes any Physical damage.

rows.name: Dog
rows.magician_advantage: +2 dice for Detection spells, preparations, and rituals
rows.disadvantage: Cannot leave someone behind, betray comrades, or let another sacrifice themselves without making a successful Charisma + Willpower (3) Test.

rows.name: Dragonslayer
rows.all_advantage: +2 dice pool modifier for one social skill of choice
rows.magician_advantage: +2 dice for Combat spells, preparations, and rituals
rows.adept_advantage: 1 free level of Enhanced Accuracy (skill) and 1 free level of Danger Sense
rows.disadvantage: Breaking a promise (by choice or accident): −1 dice pool modifier to all actions until promise is fulfilled.

rows.name: Eagle
rows.magician_advantage: +2 dice for summoning spirits of air
rows.disadvantage: Gains the Allergy (pollutants, mild) quality (no bonus Karma for this negative quality).

rows.name: Fire-Bringer
rows.all_advantage: +2 dice to Artisan skill tests or Alchemy skill tests (choose one)
rows.magician_advantage: +2 dice for Manipulation spells, preparations, and spell rituals
rows.adept_advantage: 1 free level of Improved Ability on a non-combat skill
rows.disadvantage: Cannot refuse a sincere request for help without succeeding in a Simple Charisma + Willpower (3) Test.

rows.name: Mountain
rows.magician_advantage: +2 dice for Counterspelling Tests and anchored rituals
rows.disadvantage: Once a plan is decided on, must make Charisma + Willpower (3) Test to abandon it. Also must make the test to proceed in anything without a plan.

rows.name: Rat
rows.magician_advantage: +2 dice to Alchemy tests when harvesting reagents; may use reagents of any tradition at full strength
rows.disadvantage: Must make Charisma + Willpower (3) Test to not immediately flee or seek cover whenever caught in a combat situation. If nowhere to flee, forced to fight.

rows.name: Raven
rows.magician_advantage: +2 dice for Manipulation spells, preparations, and spell rituals
rows.adept_advantage: Free Traceless Walk and 1 level of Voice Control
rows.disadvantage: Must make Charisma + Willpower (3) Test to avoid exploiting someone else's misfortune to own advantage or pulling a clever trick or prank even if it's to the disadvantage of friends.

rows.name: Sea
rows.magician_advantage: +2 dice for summoning spirits of water
rows.adept_advantage: 1 free Improved Ability on an athletic skill (selected when receiving bonus)
rows.disadvantage: Must make Charisma + Willpower (3) Test to give away something owned or be charitable in some way.

rows.name: Seducer
rows.magician_advantage: +2 dice for spells, preparations, and spell rituals of the Illusion category
rows.adept_advantage: 1 free level of Improved Ability for a skill in the Acting or Influence skill group
rows.disadvantage: Must succeed in a Charisma + Willpower (3) Test to avoid pursuing a vice or indulgence (drugs, BTLs, sex, and so on) when it is made available.

rows.name: Shark
rows.magician_advantage: +2 dice for spells, preparations, and spell rituals of the Combat category
rows.disadvantage: May go berserk when taking Physical damage in combat. Make Simple Charisma + Willpower Test (wound modifiers apply); go berserk for 3 turns minus 1 per hit. While berserk, attack attacker(s) without regard for own safety.

rows.name: Snake
rows.magician_advantage: +2 dice for spells, preparations, and spell rituals of the Detection category
rows.disadvantage: Must succeed in a Charisma + Willpower (3) Test to avoid pursuing secrets or knowledge that few people know about when hints of its existence are received.

rows.name: Thunderbird
rows.magician_advantage: +2 dice for summoning spirits of air
rows.disadvantage: Must succeed in a Charisma + Willpower (3) Test to avoid responding to an insult in kind.

rows.name: Wise Warrior
rows.all_advantage: +2 dice to Leadership or Instruction skill tests (choose one)
rows.magician_advantage: +2 dice for spells, preparations, and spell rituals of the Combat category
rows.adept_advantage: 1 free level of Improved Ability on a Combat skill
rows.disadvantage: Acting dishonorably or without courtesy (by choice or by accident): −1 dice pool modifier to all actions until behavior is atoned for.

rows.name: Wolf
rows.magician_advantage: +2 dice for spells, preparations, and rituals in the Combat category
rows.disadvantage: Must succeed in a Charisma + Willpower (3) Test to retreat from a fight.
